---
image: img.png
title: Identifying Correct or Incorrect Emotion Recognition from Facial Expression
  Time Series using R
author: Damien Dupré
description: Consortium of European Research on Emotion (CERE 2025)
date: '2025-07-16'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Consortium of European Research on Emotion (CERE 2025)

:::
